name: Client Operating Model Phase 7 Build Simulation Runtime
outcome_goal: Implement deterministic simulation runtime: scenario execution, simulated actions, automation rule evaluation, transition/event trace, assertions, verifier outputs, typed gaps, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not call live external systems.
Do not use ambient time or randomness.
Do not hide unsupported actions as no-ops.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_07_simulation_runtime_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 7 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_07_simulation_runtime/PLAN.md. Implement deterministic simulation runtime primitives that operate on the Virtual Lab state substrate: scenario contracts, controlled clock/seed config, action dispatcher with typed result envelopes, automation rule eligibility and firing order, loop/recursion guards, event/transition trace collection, assertion and verifier result contracts, blockers and typed gaps. Add tests for happy path, unsupported action, ordering, deterministic replay, automation loop guard, assertion failure, and verifier output. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_07_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 8 promotion needs. Do not stage or commit.
